name: node-api-example
description: Example Node.js API project used to validate BrikByteOS CI templates.

scripts.test:shard: ARTIFACT_ROOT="${GITHUB_WORKSPACE:-$(pwd)}/test-artifacts"; mkdir -p "$ARTIFACT_ROOT/test-results" "$ARTIFACT_ROOT/coverage" && NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' c8 --reporter=json --reporter=json-summary --report-dir="$ARTIFACT_ROOT/coverage" node --test --test-reporter node-test-junit-reporter --test-reporter-destination "$ARTIFACT_ROOT/test-results/junit.xml" tests/unit

author: BrikByte Studios
